about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am an Azure & AI consultant and engineer with a passion for building scalable cloud solutions and intelligent applications. With expertise in cloud architecture and AI integration, I help businesses transform their digital presence.
about.paragraph2: My approach combines technical excellence with business understanding, ensuring that every solution not only works flawlessly but also delivers measurable value. I specialize in Azure cloud services, full-stack development, and cutting-edge AI technologies.
about.paragraph3: Whether it's architecting complex cloud infrastructures, developing intelligent chatbots, or creating seamless user experiences, I bring dedication and expertise to every project.

services.title: Services
